data.title: SR BANCORP, INC. ANNOUNCES FINANCIAL RESULTS
data.description: A financial institution in Bound Brook, New Jersey, SR Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: SRBK), which owns Somerset Regal Bank, reported a net income of $886,000 for the quarter ending on March 31, 2026. This translates to earnings of $0.12 per basic and diluted share, marking a notable increase compared to the previous period.

data.title: Washington Trust elects Jeffrey M. Wilhelm to Board of Directors
data.description: Westerly, Rhode Island - On April 28, 2026, Washington Trust Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: WASH) revealed the appointment of Jeffrey M. Wilhelm to its boards. With over 25 years of expertise in data, technology, and digital transformation, Wilhelm is recognized as a prominent figure in the industry. This move signifies the Corporation's commitment to capitalizing on his extensive knowledge in these areas.

data.title: Carlsmed, Inc. To Participate in Upcoming Investor Conferences
data.description: In an announcement on April 28, 2026, Carlsmed, Inc. (Nasdaq: CARL), led by Mike Cordonnier as Chairman and CEO, revealed their participation in upcoming investor conferences.

data.title: HelloNation Explains All-Inclusive Wedding Venue Packages Featuring Wedding Venue Expert Michelle Benson
data.description: Exploring the elements of planning and coordination in bundled wedding services, the article delves into the offerings that couples can anticipate from all-inclusive wedding venues. A recent publication on April 28, 2026, in COLORADO SPRINGS, Colo., sheds light on deciphering the true inclusions of such venues. Common queries addressed are the essence of an all-inclusive package and the means through which couples can ascertain the actual services provided. The information serves as a guide to understanding what these services offer, essentially aiding couples in making informed decisions for their special day.

data.title: Solésence To Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Host a Conference Call on May 12
data.description: Solésence, Inc., a top player in health care solutions in beauty and life sciences, shared plans to release its first-quarter results for 2026 on May 12, 2026, after the market opens. The company, listed as Nasdaq: SLSN, will also conduct a conference call and webcast on the same day to discuss these results. This update came from Romeoville, Illinois, indicating exciting developments for stakeholders and investors.

data.title: UPDATED: NorthStrive Biosciences Files New U.S. Patent Application Covering EL-22 Formulations and Dosing for Treatment of Muscle-Wasting Conditions related to GLP-1 Use, Sarcopenia, Muscle Disuse Atrophy, and Certain Neurological Disorders
data.description: NorthStrive Biosciences has recently submitted a new patent application in the United States that pertains to EL-22 formulations and dosing for the treatment of muscle-wasting conditions. This patent application signifies the company's commitment to advancing research in this field. The specifics of the patent cover the formulations and dosing requirements for EL-22, a potential treatment option for muscle-wasting conditions. This development showcases NorthStrive Biosciences' dedication to innovation and potentially significant advances in the treatment of muscle-related issues.

data.title: Galapagos’ Shareholders Adopt All Resolutions Proposed by the Board of Directors at the Annual and Extraordinary Shareholders’ Meetings 2026
data.description: Mechelen, Belgium - April 28, 2026 - Galapagos NV disclosed that during the Annual and Extraordinary Shareholders’ Meetings on April 28, 2026, all resolutions put forth were successfully passed. Galapagos NV, listed on Euronext and NASDAQ under the ticker symbol GLPG, confirmed the approval of all proposed resolutions during the meetings.

data.title: EXL Reports 2026 First Quarter Results
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, the company reported a significant increase in revenue, reaching $570.4 million, marking a 13.8% rise compared to the previous year. The Q1 Diluted EPS (GAAP) also displayed growth, standing at $0.43, a 5.7% increase from the $0.40 reported in the first quarter of 2025. Furthermore, the Q1 Adjusted Diluted EPS (Non-GAAP) reached $0.58, reflecting a substantial surge of 20.2% from $0.48 in Q1 of 2025.

data.title: Natur-Tec Selected for the 2026 International Fresh Produce Association’s Packaging Innovation Program
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Natur-Tec®, a division of Northern Technologies International Corporation (Nasdaq: NTIC), a prominent producer of eco-friendly biobased and compostable products, revealed that it had secured a spot among the seven firms chosen for the 2026 International Fresh Produce Association’s Packaging Innovation Program.

data.title: Design Therapeutics releases Q1 2026 financial results and business updates.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has significantly decreased to 4.5%, marking a 2% decrease from the previous quarter. This positive trend suggests that more individuals have gained employment opportunities in various sectors. Additionally, the report highlighted that the GDP has shown a growth of 7% this year, surpassing expectations and indicating a strong economic recovery. The government has attributed these improvements to successful policy implementations and efforts to boost the job market. Overall, these statistics indicate a promising outlook for the economy and job market, signaling progress and stability.

data.title: Gateway Bank, F.S.B. Reports First Quarter 2026 Results; Highlighted by 24% Loan Growth Year Over Year
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in Oakland, California, Gateway Bank, F.S.B. (OTCPK: GWBK) disclosed a net loss of $336,000 for Q1 of 2026, contrasting with a net loss of $1.23 million in the previous quarter and $958,000 in Q1 of 2025. Enhanced operating outcomes were a consequence of net interest margin expansion and steady loan growth, as per unaudited financial reports provided by the Bank.

data.title: Expand Energy Corporation Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Spring, Texas, on April 28, 2026, Expand Energy Corporation (NASDAQ: EXE) shared its first quarter 2026 financial and operational outcomes.

data.title: Eagle Bancorp Montana Earns $4.0 Million, or $0.51 per Diluted Share, in the First Quarter of 2026, Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend of $0.145 Per Share and Renews Stock Repurchase Plan
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in Helena, Montana, Eagle Bancorp Montana, Inc. (NASDAQ: EBMT) revealed its financial results for the first quarter of 2026. The company, which is the parent of Opportunity Bank of Montana, posted a net income of $4.0 million, equivalent to $0.51 per diluted share. This is a decrease from the previous quarter's $4.7 million, or $0.60 per diluted share, but an improvement from the $3.2 million, or $0.41 per diluted share, reported in the first quarter of 2025.

data.title: AutoLeap Introduces the First AI Receptionist for Auto Shops: AutoLeap AIR
data.description: AutoLeap, a prominent provider of shop management software, has introduced AutoLeap AIR, the automotive industry's inaugural AI-based receptionist.

data.title: ALWAYS BEST CARE EXPANDS SENIOR CARE SERVICES WITH NEW LOCATION IN CINCINNATI
data.description: Compassionate in-home care and senior living support are now more accessible to families in Rocklin, California, with the launch of a new office by Always Best Care Senior Services. This leading provider of non-medical in-home senior care and assisted living referral services unveiled the new location on April 28, 2026. The initiative aims to cater to the growing demand for elderly care services in the region and offer support to families in need. This development is a significant step towards ensuring the well-being of seniors in Rocklin, with the new office poised to serve a large number of individuals seeking quality care and living options for their elderly loved ones.

data.title: Growing Together: Life Time Foundation's Enduring Commitment to a Thriving, Healthy Planet
data.description: In the spirit of Earth Month, a significant milestone was reached with over $3 million in grants awarded since late 2023, showcasing a long-term dedication to supporting communities, revitalizing ecosystems, and safeguarding natural spaces. Noteworthy results include the Life Time Foundation's contributions towards tree planting initiatives and conservation efforts.
